name: Cox-Helper
title: Chambers Helper
description: Tracks Olm rotations, specials, tick counters, and various boss helpers for CoX.

configurationOptions.name: License Key
configurationOptions.description: License key required to enable the plugin.

configurationOptions.name: Muttadile Marker
configurationOptions.description: Places an overlay around muttadiles showing their melee range.

configurationOptions.name: Tekton Marker
configurationOptions.description: Places an overlay around Tekton showing his melee range.

configurationOptions.name: Tekton Tick Counters
configurationOptions.description: Counts down current phase timer, and attack ticks.

configurationOptions.name: Guardians Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Places an overlay near Guardians showing safespot.

configurationOptions.name: Guardians Tick Timing
configurationOptions.description: Places an overlay on Guardians showing attack tick timers.

configurationOptions.name: Highlight Vanguards
configurationOptions.description: Color is based on their attack style.

configurationOptions.name: Show Vanguards Current HP
configurationOptions.description: This will create an infobox with vanguards current hp.

configurationOptions.name: Olm Show Prayer
configurationOptions.description: Shows what prayer to use during olm.

configurationOptions.name: Olm Show Burn/Acid Timers
configurationOptions.description: Shows tick timers for burns/acids.

configurationOptions.name: Olm Show Teleport Overlays
configurationOptions.description: Shows Overlays for targeted teleports.

configurationOptions.name: Olm Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Show Tick Counter on Olm

configurationOptions.name: Olm Debug Info
configurationOptions.description: Dev tool to show info about olm

configurationOptions.name: Olm Phase Type
configurationOptions.description: Will highlight olm depending on which phase type is active. Red=Flame Green=Acid Purple=Crystal

configurationOptions.name: Highlight Olm Falling Crystals
configurationOptions.description: Will highlight falling crystals in the final head phase for Olm.

configurationOptions.name: Muttadile Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Change hit area tile color for muttadiles

configurationOptions.name: Guardians Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Change safespot area tile color for Guardians

configurationOptions.name: Tekton Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Change hit area tile color for Tekton

configurationOptions.name: Burn Victim Color
configurationOptions.description: Changes tile color for burn victim.

configurationOptions.name: Acid Victim Color
configurationOptions.description: Changes tile color for acid victim.

configurationOptions.name: Teleport Target Color
configurationOptions.description: Changes tile color for teleport target.

configurationOptions.name: Olm Special Color
configurationOptions.description: Changes color of a special on Olm's tick counter

configurationOptions.name: Font Style
configurationOptions.description: Bold/Italics/Plain

configurationOptions.name: Shadows
configurationOptions.description: Adds Shadows to text.

name: Theatre-of-Blood
title: Theatre of Blood
description: All in one plugin for Theatre of Blood. Maiden attack ticks, Nylo menu entry swaps, aggressive nylo highlights, bloat timers, Sote prayer and maze overlay, tick eat timers, Verzik crab identifier and more!

configurationOptions.name: License Key
configurationOptions.description: License key required to enable the plugin.

configurationOptions.name: Theatre Overlay Font Size
configurationOptions.description: Sets the font size for all theatre text overlays.

configurationOptions.name: Font Style
configurationOptions.description: Bold/Italics/Plain.

configurationOptions.name: Prayer Helper
configurationOptions.description: Display prayer indicator in the prayer tab or in the bottom right corner of the screen

configurationOptions.name: Prayer Descending Boxes
configurationOptions.description: Draws timing boxes above the prayer icons, as if you were playing Guitar Hero

configurationOptions.name: Indicate Non-Priority Boxes
configurationOptions.description: Render descending boxes for prayers that are not the priority prayer for that tick

configurationOptions.name: Always Show Prayer Helper
configurationOptions.description: Render prayer helper at all time, even when other inventory tabs are open.

configurationOptions.name: Box Color
configurationOptions.description: Color for descending box normal

configurationOptions.name: Box Color Danger
configurationOptions.description: Color for descending box one tick before damage

configurationOptions.name: Verzik
configurationOptions.description: Render prayers during the Verzik fight

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg
configurationOptions.description: Render prayers during the Soteseg fight

configurationOptions.name: Maiden Blood Attack Marker
configurationOptions.description: Highlights Maiden's Blood Pools.

configurationOptions.name: Maiden Blood Spawns Marker
configurationOptions.description: Highlights Maiden Blood Spawns (Tomatoes).

configurationOptions.name: Maiden Reds Health Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Displays the health of each red crab.

configurationOptions.name: Maiden Reds Distance Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Displays the distance of each red crab to reach Maiden.

configurationOptions.name: Maiden Tank Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays the tick counter for when she decides who to choose for tanking.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Tile Indicator
configurationOptions.description: Highlights Bloat's Tile.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Indicator Color - UP
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for when Bloat is UP.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Indicator Color - THRESHOLD
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for when Bloat UP and goes over 37 ticks, which allows you to know when he can go down.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Indicator Color - DOWN
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for when Bloat is DOWN.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Indicator Color - WARN
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for when Bloat is DOWN and about to get UP.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays the tick counter for how long Bloat has been DOWN or UP.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Tick Time Style
configurationOptions.description: Count up or Count down options on bloat downed state

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Hands Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the tiles where Bloat's hands will fall.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Hands Overlay Color
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for the Bloat Hands Overlay to be.

configurationOptions.name: Bloat Hands Overlay Thickness
configurationOptions.description: Sets the stroke width of the tile overlay where the hands fall. (BIGGER = THICKER).

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Pillar Health Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Displays the health percentage of the pillars.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Explosion Warning
configurationOptions.description: Highlights a Nylocas that is about to explode.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Display Last Ticks
configurationOptions.description: Displays the last 'x' amount of ticks for a Nylocas. (ex: to see the last 10 ticks, you set it to 10).

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Display Explosion Style
configurationOptions.description: How to display when a nylocas is about to explode.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Tick Time Alive
configurationOptions.description: Displays the tick counter of each nylocas spawn (Explodes on 52).

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Tick Time Alive Style
configurationOptions.description: Count up or Count down options on the tick time alive.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Recolor Menu Options
configurationOptions.description: Recolors the menu options of each Nylocas to it's respective attack style.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Highlight Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Select your role to highlight respective Nylocas to attack.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Alive Counter Panel
configurationOptions.description: Displays how many Nylocas are currently alive.

configurationOptions.name: Highlight Aggressive Nylocas
configurationOptions.description: Highlights aggressive Nylocas after they spawn.

configurationOptions.name: Highlight Aggressive Nylocas Style
configurationOptions.description: Highlight style for aggressive Nylocas after they spawn.

configurationOptions.name: Remove Attack Options
configurationOptions.description: Removes the attack options for Nylocas immune to your current attack style.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Waves Helper
configurationOptions.description: Overlay's squares with wave numbers on nylo entry bridges for upcoming nylos

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Ticks Until Wave
configurationOptions.description: Prints how many ticks until the next wave could spawn

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Instance Timer
configurationOptions.description: Displays an instance timer when the next set will potentially spawn - ENTER ON ZERO.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Stall Wave Messages
configurationOptions.description: Sends a chat message when you have stalled the next wave of Nylocas to spawn due to being capped.

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Big Splits
configurationOptions.description: Tells you when bigs will spawn little nylos

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Boss Attack Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays the ticks left until the Nylocas Boss will attack next (LEFT-MOST).

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Boss Switch Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays the ticks left until the Nylocas Boss will switch next (MIDDLE).

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Boss Total Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays the total ticks since the Nylocas Boss has spawned (RIGHT-MOST).

configurationOptions.name: Nylocas Boss Remove Attack Options
configurationOptions.description: Removes the attack options for Nylocas Boss when immune to your current attack style.

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg Maze
configurationOptions.description: Memorizes Solo Mazes and displays tiles of other chosen players.

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg Small Attack Orb Ticks
configurationOptions.description: Displays the amount of ticks until it will hit you (change prayers when you see 1).

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg Auto Attack Ticks
configurationOptions.description: Displays a tick counter for when Sotetseg will attack next.

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg Attack Counter
configurationOptions.description: Countdown until death ball.

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg Big Ball Tick Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Displays how many ticks until the ball will explode (eat when you see 0).

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg Big Ball Tick Color
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for the Sotetseg Big Ball tick countdown text.

configurationOptions.name: Sotetseg Big Ball Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for the Sotetseg Big Ball tile color.

configurationOptions.name: Xarpus Instance Timer
configurationOptions.description: Displays the Xarpus Instance timer to be tick efficient with the first spawn of an exhumed - ENTER ON ZERO.

configurationOptions.name: Xarpus Exhumed Markers
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the tiles of exhumed spawns.

configurationOptions.name: Xarpus Exhumed Ticks
configurationOptions.description: Displays how many ticks until the exhumeds will despawn.

configurationOptions.name: Xarpus Attack Tick - P2
configurationOptions.description: Displays a tick counter for when Xarpus faces a new target to spit at.

configurationOptions.name: Xarpus Attack Tick - P3
configurationOptions.description: Displays a tick counter for when Xarpus will rotate.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Tile Indicator
configurationOptions.description: Highlights Verzik's tile - If you are next to or inside of the indicator, you can be meleed.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Range Tile Markers
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the tiles of Verzik's range projectiles.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Range Tile Markers Color
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for the Verzik's Range Projectile Tile Overlay to be.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Reds Health Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Displays the health of red crabs during Verzik.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Attack Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays the ticks until Verzik will attack next.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Attack Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays Verzik's Attack Count (useful for when P2 reds as they despawn after the 7th attack).

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Total Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays the total amount of ticks Verzik has been alive for.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Nylo Direct Aggro Warning
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the Nylocas that are targeting YOU and ONLY you.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Nylo Indirect Aggro Warnings
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the Nylocas that are targeting OTHER players.

configurationOptions.name: Lightning Attack Helper
configurationOptions.description: Displays the number of attacks before a lightning ball.

configurationOptions.name: Lightning Attack Tick
configurationOptions.description: Displays the number of ticks before a lightning ball hits you.

configurationOptions.name: Poison Weapons
configurationOptions.description: If a weapon is added to this set, it will NOT deprio attack on Nylocas Athanatos.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Nylo Explosion Area
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the area of explosion for the Nylocas (Personal or Indirect Warnings MUST be enabled).

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Display Tank
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the tile of the player tanking to help clarify.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Yellows Overlay
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the yellow pools and displays the amount of ticks until you can move away or tick eat.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Green Ball Tank
configurationOptions.description: Displays who the green ball is targeting.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Green Ball Highlight Color
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for the Verzik's Green Ball Tile Overlay to be.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Green Ball Marker
configurationOptions.description: Choose between a tile or 3-by-3 area marker.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Green Ball Tick
configurationOptions.description: Displays the number of ticks until the green ball nukes you.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Personal Tornado Highlight
configurationOptions.description: Displays the tornado that is targeting you.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik ONLY Highlight Personal
configurationOptions.description: Displays the tornado that is targeting you ONLY after it solves which one is targeting you.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Tornado Highlight Color
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for the Verzik Tornadoes Overlay to be.

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Poison Tile Highlight
configurationOptions.description: Highlight tile with disappearing poison

configurationOptions.name: Verzik Poison Tile Highlight Color
configurationOptions.description: Select a color for the Verzik poison tiles.

name: Zulrah
title: Zulrah
description: Tracks Zulrah rotations, snakelings, where to stand, where to move, and what to pray.

configurationOptions.name: License Key
configurationOptions.description: License key required to enable the plugin.

configurationOptions.name: Font Type
configurationOptions.description: Configure the font for the plugin overlays to use

configurationOptions.name: Text Outline
configurationOptions.description: Use an outline around text instead of a text shadow

configurationOptions.name: Outline Width
configurationOptions.description: Configures the stroke for the plugin polygons

configurationOptions.name: Fill Alpha
configurationOptions.description: Configures the fill intensity for the plugin polygons

configurationOptions.name: Phase Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays a tick counter on Zulrah showing how long until the next phase

configurationOptions.name: Attack Tick Counter
configurationOptions.description: Displays an attack tick counter on Zulrah showing how long until the next auto attack

configurationOptions.name: Tick Counter Colors
configurationOptions.description: Configure the color for the Zulrah tick counters

configurationOptions.name: Total Tick Counter (InfoBox)
configurationOptions.description: Displays a total tick counter infobox showing how long Zulrah has been alive for in ticks

configurationOptions.name: Display Zulrah's Tile
configurationOptions.description: Highlights Zulrah's current tile in a 5x5

configurationOptions.name: Zulrah's Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Configures the color for Zulrah's tile highlight

configurationOptions.name: Prayer Helper
configurationOptions.description:
Displays an overlay showing the correct prayer to use for the entirety of the Zulrah fight
Changes color dependent on whether or not you're praying correctly or not

configurationOptions.name: Prayer Marker
configurationOptions.description:
Marks the correct prayer to use in the prayer book to use for the entirety of the Zulrah fight
Changes color dependent on whether or not you're praying correctly or not

configurationOptions.name: Prayer Conservation
configurationOptions.description:
Displays text over your head showing when it's safe to turn off your overheads
Overlay gets displayed when Zulrah is not actively targeting you and your overheads are on

configurationOptions.name: Stand Locations
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the tiles to stand on for the current and next Zulrah phase

configurationOptions.name: Stand/Next Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Configure the color for the stand/next GROUPED tile and text

configurationOptions.name: Stand Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Configure the color for the current stand tile and text

configurationOptions.name: Next Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Configure the color for the next stand tile and text

configurationOptions.name: Stall Locations
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the tile to pillar stall a Zulrah phase if it supports it

configurationOptions.name: Stall Tile Color
configurationOptions.description: Configures the color for the stall tile and text

configurationOptions.name: Display Type
configurationOptions.description:
Overlay: Displays Zulrah's phases details on an overlay
Tile: Displays Zulrah's phases details on tiles

configurationOptions.name: Display Mode
configurationOptions.description:
Current: Only displays the current Zulrah phase
Next: Only displays the next Zulrah phase

configurationOptions.name: Rotation Name
configurationOptions.description:
Requires: Display Type ('Overlay' or 'Both')
Displays text above InfoBox overlay showing the rotation name or unidentified

configurationOptions.name: Hats
configurationOptions.description: Displays Zulrah's skill type as an icon on the tile overlay

configurationOptions.name: Tags
configurationOptions.description:
Tags each Zulrah phase on the tile overlay with:
[Current] = Current Zulrah phase
[Next] = Definite next Zulrah phase
[P. Next] = Potentially Zulrah's next phase

configurationOptions.name: Instance Timer
configurationOptions.description:
Displays an overlay showing how long Zulrah has been alive in minutes:seconds format
Timer resets on Zulrah death and/or leaving of the instance of any fashion

configurationOptions.name: Snakeling
configurationOptions.description:
Remove Att. Op.: Removes the 'Attack' option from all the active Snakelings
Entity Hider: Hides all the active Snakelings

configurationOptions.name: Snakeling Hotkey
configurationOptions.description: Override the Snakeling MES to show attack options while hotkey is pressed

configurationOptions.name: Toxic Clouds
configurationOptions.description: Highlights the Toxic Clouds and displays their time until despawn

configurationOptions.name: Toxic Clouds Color
configurationOptions.description: Configures the color of the Toxic Cloud highlight

configurationOptions.name: Projectiles
configurationOptions.description: Displays when and where the Snakeling/Toxic Clouds projectile will approximately land

configurationOptions.name: Projectiles Color
configurationOptions.description: Configures the color of the Projectiles highlight

configurationOptions.description: Overlay poison tiles with a colored outline.

configurationOptions.name: Safe color
configurationOptions.description: Color indicating there are at least two hydra attacks pending.

configurationOptions.name: Warning color
configurationOptions.description: Color indicating there is one hydra attack pending.

configurationOptions.name: Danger color
configurationOptions.description: Color indiciating the hydra will change attacks.

name: Cerberus
title: Cerberus
description: Tracks ghosts, Cerberus prayer rotations, and more.

configurationOptions.name: License Key
configurationOptions.description: Cerberus License key required to enable the plugin.

configurationOptions.name: Show ghost tiles
configurationOptions.description: Overlay ghost tiles with respective colors and attack timers.

configurationOptions.name: Calculate auto attack prayer
configurationOptions.description: Calculate prayer for auto attacks based on your equipment defensive bonuses.

configurationOptions.name: Show current attack
configurationOptions.description: Overlay the current attack in a separate infobox.

configurationOptions.name: Show current attack timer
configurationOptions.description: Display a timer on the current attack infobox.

configurationOptions.name: Show upcoming attacks
configurationOptions.description: Overlay upcoming attacks in stacked info boxes.

configurationOptions.name: # of attacks
configurationOptions.description: Number of upcoming attacks to render.

configurationOptions.name: Reverse order
configurationOptions.description: Reverse the order of the upcoming attacks.

configurationOptions.name: Show attack number
configurationOptions.description: Display the attack pattern number on each upcoming attack.

configurationOptions.name: Upcoming attacks orientation
configurationOptions.description: Display upcoming attacks vertically or horizontally.

configurationOptions.name: Info box size
configurationOptions.description: Size of the upcoming attacks infoboxes.

configurationOptions.name: Guitar Hero mode
configurationOptions.description: Display descending boxes indicating the correct prayer for the current attack.

configurationOptions.name: # of ticks
configurationOptions.description: The number of ticks, before the upcoming current attack, to render.
